allow: PowerShell($cmds = 'node','npm','python','py','firebase'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\($p\){ "$c -> $p" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5510 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "server fermato" } else { "nessun server sulla 5510" })
